title: Gusto vs Paddle
description: Compare Gusto vs Paddle — a hr & people platform versus a finance & accounting solution. Find out which tool better suits your workflow.
verdict: Gusto (HR & People) and Paddle (Finance & Accounting) serve different primary purposes. Gusto has a higher user rating, but the right choice depends on whether your priority is hr & people or finance & accounting capabilities.

faqs.question: What is the difference between Gusto and Paddle?
faqs.answer: Gusto is a hr & people tool, while Paddle is a finance & accounting platform. They serve different primary functions but may overlap in certain areas.

faqs.question: Can Gusto replace Paddle?
faqs.answer: Not directly — they serve different categories. Some organizations use both for different purposes.

faqs.question: Which has better value, Gusto or Paddle?
faqs.answer: Gusto ($40/mo + $6/person) and Paddle (2.9% + $0.50/transaction) have different pricing. Evaluate based on which category matters more for your workflows.
